theme_notes: Riffs on Putin's summit visit to Xi in Beijing to reaffirm their 'limitless partnership' (days after Trump's own Beijing trip), SpaceX's IPO filing set to make Musk the world's first trillionaire, Wembanyama's 41-point/24-rebound Game 1 masterpiece stealing home court in the WCF, and the unraveling $625M World Cup 2026 security funding gap.
settled: Xi and Putin also call each other 'partners.' Somehow you two are doing better.
Clean slate. SpaceX IPO energy. Peak partnership.
No WHO emergency has been declared. That's the bar. You've cleared it.
youOwe: You owe less than a World Cup souvenir nobody wants to buy.
Massie lost his primary. You've lost less. Mostly your dignity.
Wembanyama dropped 41 in one game. Your debt is smaller. Somehow both are embarrassing.
FIFA is missing $625 million. You're missing something smaller. Still missing.
Putin flew to Beijing for a handshake photo. You can't Venmo for a burrito.
Musk announced the SpaceX IPO. Take a moment to consider your own trajectory.
Forty-one points. Twenty-four rebounds. Wembanyama is doing his part. You are not.
The WHO mobilized an international emergency response for Ebola. Consider this a smaller intervention.
Southern Lebanon has a ceasefire on paper. Your promises have similar durability.
The World Cup's missing $625M in security funding. You're missing something too. It's called accountability.
SpaceX is about to mint a trillionaire. You are minting excuses.
Xi welcomed Putin as his 'closest ally.' Your alliance has a dollar-amount condition.
The Ebola outbreak has more coordinated international aid than your repayment plan.
SpaceX is going public to make Musk the first trillionaire. You're going private about this debt.
Putin's whole Beijing entourage traveled lighter than your debt.
FIFA's $625 million in missing World Cup funds? You're in the same conversation now.
The WHO declared a global emergency for 130 deaths. There's no category for what you've done to this relationship.
Xi and Putin have a 'limitless partnership.' Yours has reached its limit.
theyOwe: They owe you less than a World Cup beer at a venue nobody wanted.
Wembanyama grabbed 24 rebounds. Your partner can't grab a Venmo button.
Massie's career ended with more finality than this debt.
SpaceX filed for an IPO. Your partner filed for an extension.
Putin called Xi his closest ally. Your partner can't even call this paid.
They owe you the price of a World Cup ticket. Nobody's satisfied with that number either.
The WHO mobilized for Ebola faster than your partner mobilized for this.
Wembanyama stole home court in one game. Your partner can't steal five minutes to pay you.
Aaron Rodgers announced his retirement. Your partner announced nothing, paid nothing.
This debt has outlasted every ceasefire this year. Impressive in the worst way.
SpaceX's IPO will mint a trillionaire. This will mint a breakup.
Putin flew to Beijing in one day. Your partner can't close this in three months.
You are owed enough to buy World Cup tickets. You will not be going to the World Cup.
Xi and Putin called their partnership 'limitless.' Test yours. It has limits.
Wembanyama dropped 24 rebounds in one night. Your partner hasn't put up a number all month.
The $625 million FIFA is still missing? Your partner shares their energy.
The Ebola outbreak has better institutional accountability than your partner's payment history.
Putin sealed an alliance with Xi in one afternoon. Your partner can't seal a payment in a year.
